name: open-hanzi-cards
description: Free web-based flash card app for learning Chinese vocabulary and characters

scripts.gen-tts: cd tts && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python generate.py
scripts.build: pnpm run tts-setup && pnpm run gen-tts && tsc -b && node dist/tools/build.js

author: Iannis de Zwart
